title: Cobblemon Fixed Starter IVs
description: Finally nail down those Cobblemon starter IVs!
body:
# Fixed Starter IVs

v1.7.3-1.1

[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fixedstarterivs)

[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon-fixedstarterivs)

[GitHub](https://github.com/timinc-cobble/cobblemon-fixed-starter-ivs)

## What if…

…you could nail down the IVs of starters in Cobblemon?

## Features

- Allows you to configure how you would like to assign IVs for starter Pokémon.
    - Simple - Set all IVs to a specific value.
    - Range - Roll all IVs within a given range.
    - Capped - Set a maximum number of IVs to maximum.
    - Granular - Set each stat’s IV to a specific value individually.
    - Granular Ranged - Roll each stat’s IV within a given range.

## Dependencies

- [Cobblemon](https://www.notion.so/Cobblemon-22157e0d4afd80a49896c70a775a3c7f?pvs=21)
- [Cobblemon Tim Core](https://www.notion.so/Tim-Core-22057e0d4afd809b9c02e78f26805376?pvs=21)

## Testing

Run the game with the mod installed, start a new world, observe your perfect IVs (given by the base config options).

## Player Help

[Config Options](https://www.notion.so/Config-Options-2fc57e0d4afd81a0a6c4fa1059117916?pvs=21)

## Known Issues

- None. Why? Who’s asking? 👀

## Roadmap

If you’d like to keep up with the work being done on the mod, please join [the Discord](https://discord.com/invite/WKAR27SdSv) and subscribe to notifications on the channel for this content. You can also keep track of the to do list available on [the mod’s main page](https://www.notion.so/Fixed-Starter-IVs-21d57e0d4afd804a9d17ef2fe964ac05?pvs=21).

## Feedback

If you have any questions or requests concerning the mod, or just want to drop by and say hi, visit us over at [the Discord](https://discord.com/invite/WKAR27SdSv)!

## Support

If I've made something you enjoyed or helped you make something, please consider [dropping a tip in the cup](https://ko-fi.com/timsminecraftmods) and mention how I helped if you'd like!
